title: TTRP Jewelry Box
description: Something small and simple. Adds textures to items renamed to be jewelry. Some even holding wearable versions, such as bracelets and earrings
body:
Created with the intent to immerse in the Roleplay of TallTales. Changing and adding textures to small pieces of Jewelry (along with other items). Some are only meant to show, others able to be worn about.


CIT is required!! (For the old discontinued verison of the pack)
https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn

**Variants-CIT** is required!! **(For current and ongoing verisons)**
https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit

None of the textures are to be made on your own. Any that public in such a way will be listed

A discord to join to keep up to date and more involed
[https://discord.gg/JGfsHeKWKC](https://discord.gg/JGfsHeKWKC)
